title: Rephrase docs and info on podman search
body:
Rephrase the information shown when doing "podman search --help"
to clarify what exactly --registry is used for.
Touched up the man page too.

Should address https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/issues/977

Signed-off-by: umohnani8 <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body: @rhatdan PTAL, hopefully it is more clear now.

NIT: Fix commit message
``` Rephrase docs and info on podmna search ```
LGTM

:pushpin: Commit 72f6776 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 72f677684edec9868649af01dab4c6ef0c7a5790 -->
Too late to the party again!  I'd a few comments.
Well @umohnani8 can make the changes and force push if she is fast enough.  CI Seems mightly slow today anyways.
@rhatdan I am going to close this PR. Reworking search to match docker and I will add these doc changes to that PR.
